Motivation.quote: Where there is a will, there is a way.
Motivation.author: Proverb
Motivation.zh: 有志者，事竟成。
Motivation.zh_hans: 有志者，事竟成。

Motivation.quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
Motivation.author: Lao Tzu
Motivation.zh: 千里之行，始於足下。
Motivation.zh_hans: 千里之行，始于足下。

Motivation.quote: Fortune favors the bold.
Motivation.author: Latin Proverb
Motivation.zh: 勇者得天下。
Motivation.zh_hans: 勇者得天下。

Motivation.quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
Motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt
Motivation.zh: 相信自己，你已成功一半。
Motivation.zh_hans: 相信自己，你已成功一半。

Motivation.quote: The best way out is always through.
Motivation.author: Robert Frost
Motivation.zh: 走出困境的最好方法，就是穿越它。
Motivation.zh_hans: 走出困境的最好方法，就是穿越它。

Motivation.quote: Well begun is half done.
Motivation.author: Proverb
Motivation.zh: 好的開始，是成功的一半。
Motivation.zh_hans: 好的开始，是成功的一半。

Motivation.quote: Every great achievement was once considered impossible.
Motivation.author: Traditional Saying
Motivation.zh: 每一項偉大的成就，曾經都被認為是不可能的。
Motivation.zh_hans: 每一项伟大的成就，曾经都被认为是不可能的。

Motivation.quote: A river cuts through rock not because of its power but its persistence.
Motivation.author: Proverb
Motivation.zh: 水滴石穿，非力之功，乃恆之道。
Motivation.zh_hans: 水滴石穿，非力之功，乃恒之道。

Motivation.quote: Little strokes fell great oaks.
Motivation.author: Benjamin Franklin
Motivation.zh: 積少成多，滴水穿石。
Motivation.zh_hans: 积少成多，滴水穿石。

Motivation.quote: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
Motivation.author: Benjamin Franklin
Motivation.zh: 精力與毅力，可征服一切。
Motivation.zh_hans: 精力与毅力，可征服一切。

Motivation.quote: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
Motivation.author: George Eliot
Motivation.zh: 成為你本可成為的人，永遠不嫌遲。
Motivation.zh_hans: 成为你本可成为的人，永远不嫌迟。

Motivation.quote: Great things are done by a series of small things brought together.
Motivation.author: Vincent van Gogh
Motivation.zh: 偉大之事，皆由無數小事積累而成。
Motivation.zh_hans: 伟大之事，皆由无数小事积累而成。

Motivation.quote: The harder the conflict, the more glorious the triumph.
Motivation.author: Thomas Paine
Motivation.zh: 衝突愈艱難，勝利愈輝煌。
Motivation.zh_hans: 冲突愈艰难，胜利愈辉煌。

Motivation.quote: Strive not to be a success, but rather to be of value.
Motivation.author: Albert Einstein
Motivation.zh: 不要追求成功，而要追求價值。
Motivation.zh_hans: 不要追求成功，而要追求价值。

Motivation.quote: What we think, we become.
Motivation.author: Buddha
Motivation.zh: 我們的思想，造就了我們自己。
Motivation.zh_hans: 我们的思想，造就了我们自己。

Motivation.quote: Do not wait; the time will never be just right.
Motivation.author: Napoleon Hill
Motivation.zh: 不要等待，時機永遠不會完美。
Motivation.zh_hans: 不要等待，时机永远不会完美。

Motivation.quote: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
Motivation.author: Traditional Sports Saying
Motivation.zh: 不嘗試，就百分百失去機會。
Motivation.zh_hans: 不尝试，就百分百失去机会。

Motivation.quote: A ship in harbor is safe, but that is not what ships are built for.
Motivation.author: John A. Shedd
Motivation.zh: 船停在港口固然安全，但那不是造船的目的。
Motivation.zh_hans: 船停在港口固然安全，但那不是造船的目的。

Motivation.quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
Motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt
Motivation.zh: 限制我們明日成就的，只有今日的疑慮。
Motivation.zh_hans: 限制我们明日成就的，只有今日的疑虑。

Motivation.quote: Vision without action is merely a dream.
Motivation.author: Joel A. Barker
Motivation.zh: 沒有行動的願景，只是一場夢。
Motivation.zh_hans: 没有行动的愿景，只是一场梦。

Motivation.quote: He who is not courageous enough to take risks will accomplish nothing in life.
Motivation.author: Muhammad Ali
Motivation.zh: 不夠勇敢去冒險的人，一生將一事無成。
Motivation.zh_hans: 不够勇敢去冒险的人，一生将一事无成。

Motivation.quote: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
Motivation.author: Robert Collier
Motivation.zh: 成功是日復一日的小小努力積累而成。
Motivation.zh_hans: 成功是日复一日的小小努力积累而成。

Motivation.quote: The future belongs to those who prepare for it today.
Motivation.author: Malcolm X
Motivation.zh: 未來屬於今日為之準備的人。
Motivation.zh_hans: 未来属于今日为之准备的人。

Motivation.quote: Difficulties strengthen the mind, as labor does the body.
Motivation.author: Seneca
Motivation.zh: 困難磨礪心智，如同勞動鍛煉身體。
Motivation.zh_hans: 困难磨砺心智，如同劳动锻炼身体。

Motivation.quote: Great works are performed not by strength but by perseverance.
Motivation.author: Samuel Johnson
Motivation.zh: 偉大的事業不靠蠻力，靠的是堅持。
Motivation.zh_hans: 伟大的事业不靠蛮力，靠的是坚持。

Motivation.quote: You are stronger than you think.
Motivation.author: Unknown
Motivation.zh: 你比自己想像的更堅強。
Motivation.zh_hans: 你比自己想像的更坚强。

Motivation.quote: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
Motivation.author: Charles Kingsleigh
Motivation.zh: 達成不可能的唯一方法是相信它可能。
Motivation.zh_hans: 达成不可能的唯一方法是相信它可能。

Motivation.quote: Success begins with self-discipline.
Motivation.author: Unknown
Motivation.zh: 成功始於自律。
Motivation.zh_hans: 成功始于自律。

Motivation.quote: Progress, not perfection, is the goal.
Motivation.author: Unknown
Motivation.zh: 目標是進步，而不是完美。
Motivation.zh_hans: 目标是进步，而不是完美。

Motivation.quote: Dream big, then work harder.
Motivation.author: Unknown
Motivation.zh: 先做大夢，再更加努力。
Motivation.zh_hans: 先做大梦，再更加努力。

Motivation.quote: Small steps every day make a big difference.
Motivation.author: Unknown
Motivation.zh: 每天的一小步，能帶來巨大改變。
Motivation.zh_hans: 每天的一小步，能带来巨大改变。

Motivation.quote: Your mindset determines your outcome.
Motivation.author: Unknown
Motivation.zh: 心態決定結果。
Motivation.zh_hans: 心态决定结果。

Motivation.quote: Take the first step, even if you cannot see the whole staircase.
Motivation.author: Martin Luther King Jr.
Motivation.zh: 即使無法看見整段樓梯，也要邁出第一步。
Motivation.zh_hans: 即使无法看见整段楼梯，也要迈出第一步。

Motivation.quote: When you feel like quitting, remember why you started.
Motivation.author: Unknown
Motivation.zh: 當你想放棄時，記得自己為何出發。
Motivation.zh_hans: 当你想放弃时，记得自己为何出发。

Motivation.quote: The future is created by what you do today.
Motivation.author: Robert Kiyosaki
Motivation.zh: 未來，由你今天的行動創造。
Motivation.zh_hans: 未来，由你今天的行动创造。

Motivation.quote: Don’t count the days; make the days count.
Motivation.author: Muhammad Ali
Motivation.zh: 不要計算日子，讓每一天都有價值。
Motivation.zh_hans: 不要计算日子，让每一天都有价值。

Motivation.quote: Action is the foundational key to all success.
Motivation.author: Pablo Picasso
Motivation.zh: 行動是一切成功的基礎。
Motivation.zh_hans: 行动是一切成功的基础。

Motivation.quote: A positive thought can change your entire day.
Motivation.author: Unknown
Motivation.zh: 正向的念頭能改變整天。
Motivation.zh_hans: 正向的念头能改变整天。

Motivation.quote: Keep your focus on the next step. Keep going.
Motivation.author: Unknown
Motivation.zh: 把注意力放在下一步。繼續前行。
Motivation.zh_hans: 把注意力放在下一步。继续前行。

Motivation.quote: Choose courage over comfort today. Keep going.
Motivation.author: Ari
Motivation.zh: 今天選擇勇氣而不是安逸。繼續前行。
Motivation.zh_hans: 今天选择勇气而不是安逸。继续前行。

Motivation.quote: Let your effort speak louder than your fear. Keep going.
Motivation.author: Mina
Motivation.zh: 讓行動勝過恐懼。繼續前行。
Motivation.zh_hans: 让行动胜过恐惧。继续前行。

Motivation.quote: A small action can change a large day. Keep going.
Motivation.author: Jules
Motivation.zh: 一個小動作可以改變漫長的一天。繼續前行。
Motivation.zh_hans: 一个小动作可以改变漫长的一天。继续前行。

Motivation.quote: Progress begins the moment you begin. Keep going.
Motivation.author: Sage
Motivation.zh: 當你開始行動，進步就開始了。繼續前行。
Motivation.zh_hans: 当你开始行动，进步就开始了。继续前行。

Motivation.quote: Stay steady and let your work grow. Keep going.
Motivation.author: Noor
Motivation.zh: 保持穩定，讓努力持續成長。繼續前行。
Motivation.zh_hans: 保持稳定，让努力持续成长。继续前行。

Motivation.quote: Your future is shaped by today’s choices. Keep going.
Motivation.author: Drew
Motivation.zh: 你的未來由今天的選擇塑造。繼續前行。
Motivation.zh_hans: 你的未来由今天的选择塑造。继续前行。

Motivation.quote: Rise with purpose and keep moving. Keep going.
Motivation.author: Taylor
Motivation.zh: 帶着目標站起來，繼續前行。繼續前行。
Motivation.zh_hans: 带着目标站起来，继续前行。继续前行。

Motivation.quote: Make your next move with confidence. Keep going.
Motivation.author: Iris
Motivation.zh: 用自信邁出下一步。繼續前行。
Motivation.zh_hans: 用自信迈出下一步。继续前行。

Motivation.quote: Trust your effort even when results are slow. Keep going.
Motivation.author: Lena
Motivation.zh: 即使結果緩慢，也要相信自己的努力。繼續前行。
Motivation.zh_hans: 即使结果缓慢，也要相信自己的努力。继续前行。

Motivation.quote: Keep your focus on the next step. Keep believing.
Motivation.author: Unknown
Motivation.zh: 把注意力放在下一步。繼續相信自己。
Motivation.zh_hans: 把注意力放在下一步。继续相信自己。

Motivation.quote: Choose courage over comfort today. Keep believing.
Motivation.author: Ari
Motivation.zh: 今天選擇勇氣而不是安逸。繼續相信自己。
Motivation.zh_hans: 今天选择勇气而不是安逸。继续相信自己。

Motivation.author: Mina

Motivation.zh_hans: 让行动胜过恐惧。继续相信自己。

Motivation.zh: 保持穩定，讓努力持續成長。繼續創造。
Motivation.zh_hans: 保持稳定，让努力持续成长。继续创造。

Motivation.quote: Your future is shaped by today’s choices. Keep building.
Motivation.author: Drew
Motivation.zh: 你的未來由今天的選擇塑造。繼續創造。
Motivation.zh_hans: 你的未来由今天的选择塑造。继续创造。

Motivation.quote: Rise with purpose and keep moving. Keep building.
Motivation.author: Taylor
Motivation.zh: 帶着目標站起來，繼續前行。繼續創造。
Motivation.zh_hans: 带着目标站起来，继续前行。继续创造。

Motivation.quote: Make your next move with confidence. Keep building.
Motivation.author: Iris
Motivation.zh: 用自信邁出下一步。繼續創造。
Motivation.zh_hans: 用自信迈出下一步。继续创造。

Motivation.quote: Trust your effort even when results are slow. Keep building.
Motivation.author: Lena
Motivation.zh: 即使結果緩慢，也要相信自己的努力。繼續創造。
Motivation.zh_hans: 即使结果缓慢，也要相信自己的努力。继续创造。

Motivation.quote: Keep your focus on the next step. Stay strong.
Motivation.author: Unknown
Motivation.zh: 把注意力放在下一步。保持堅強。
Motivation.zh_hans: 把注意力放在下一步。保持坚强。

Motivation.quote: Choose courage over comfort today. Stay strong.
Motivation.author: Ari
Motivation.zh: 今天選擇勇氣而不是安逸。保持堅強。
Motivation.zh_hans: 今天选择勇气而不是安逸。保持坚强。

Motivation.quote: Let your effort speak louder than your fear. Stay strong.
Motivation.author: Mina
Motivation.zh: 讓行動勝過恐懼。保持堅強。
Motivation.zh_hans: 让行动胜过恐惧。保持坚强。

Motivation.quote: A small action can change a large day. Stay strong.
Motivation.author: Jules
Motivation.zh: 一個小動作可以改變漫長的一天。保持堅強。
Motivation.zh_hans: 一个小动作可以改变漫长的一天。保持坚强。

Motivation.quote: Progress begins the moment you begin. Stay strong.
Motivation.author: Sage
Motivation.zh: 當你開始行動，進步就開始了。保持堅強。
Motivation.zh_hans: 当你开始行动，进步就开始了。保持坚强。

Motivation.quote: Keep your focus on the next step. Move forward.

Motivation.zh: 把注意力放在下一步。繼續向前。
Motivation.zh_hans: 把注意力放在下一步。继续向前。

Healing.quote: This too shall pass.
Healing.author: Traditional Proverb
Healing.zh: 一切終將過去。
Healing.zh_hans: 一切终将过去。

Healing.quote: Time heals all wounds.
Healing.author: Proverb
Healing.zh: 時間能治癒一切創傷。
Healing.zh_hans: 时间能治愈一切创伤。

Healing.quote: After the storm comes the calm.
Healing.author: Proverb
Healing.zh: 暴風雨過後，必有風平浪靜。
Healing.zh_hans: 暴风雨过后，必有风平浪静。

Healing.quote: The wound is the place where the Light enters you.
Healing.author: Rumi
Healing.zh: 傷口，正是光照進來的地方。
Healing.zh_hans: 伤口，正是光照进来的地方。

Healing.quote: Every day may not be good, but there is good in every day.
Healing.author: Traditional Saying
Healing.zh: 不是每天都美好，但每天都有美好的地方。
Healing.zh_hans: 不是每天都美好，但每天都有美好的地方。

Healing.quote: Out of suffering have emerged the strongest souls.
Healing.author: Khalil Gibran
Healing.zh: 最強大的靈魂，往往從苦難中誕生。
Healing.zh_hans: 最强大的灵魂，往往从苦难中诞生。

Healing.quote: Tomorrow is a new day.
Healing.author: Traditional Saying
Healing.zh: 明天又是新的一天。
Healing.zh_hans: 明天又是新的一天。

Healing.quote: The soul that sees beauty may sometimes walk alone.
Healing.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe
Healing.zh: 懂得欣賞美的靈魂，有時只能獨自前行。
Healing.zh_hans: 懂得欣赏美的灵魂，有时只能独自前行。

Healing.quote: Peace comes from within.
Healing.author: Buddha
Healing.zh: 寧靜來自內心。
Healing.zh_hans: 宁静来自内心。

Healing.quote: A calm sea does not make a skilled sailor.
Healing.author: Proverb
Healing.zh: 平靜的海洋，造就不了優秀的水手。
Healing.zh_hans: 平静的海洋，造就不了优秀的水手。

Healing.quote: Even the darkest night will end and the sun will rise.
Healing.author: Victor Hugo
Healing.zh: 即使是最黑暗的夜晚，也終將迎來黎明。
Healing.zh_hans: 即使是最黑暗的夜晚，也终将迎来黎明。

Healing.quote: Health is the greatest gift, contentment the greatest wealth.
Healing.author: Buddha
Healing.zh: 健康是最大的禮物，知足是最大的財富。
Healing.zh_hans: 健康是最大的礼物，知足是最大的财富。

Healing.quote: The best remedy for those who are afraid, lonely, or unhappy is to go outside.
Healing.author: Anne Frank
Healing.zh: 對於恐懼、孤獨或不快樂的人，最好的良藥就是走到戶外去。
Healing.zh_hans: 对于恐惧、孤独或不快乐的人，最好的良药就是走到户外去。

Healing.quote: In the middle of winter, I found there was, within me, an invincible summer.
Healing.author: Albert Camus
Healing.zh: 在隆冬，我終於發現，我內心深處有一個不可征服的夏天。
Healing.zh_hans: 在隆冬，我终于发现，我内心深处有一个不可征服的夏天。

Healing.quote: Slow and steady wins the race.
Healing.author: Aesop's Fables
Healing.zh: 穩紮穩打，方能致勝。
Healing.zh_hans: 稳扎稳打，方能致胜。

Healing.quote: Grief is the price we pay for love.
Healing.author: Queen Elizabeth II (traditional saying)
Healing.zh: 悲傷，是我們為愛所付出的代價。
Healing.zh_hans: 悲伤，是我们为爱所付出的代价。

Healing.quote: Rest when you're weary, refresh and renew yourself.
Healing.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
Healing.zh: 疲憊時就休息，讓自己煥然一新。
Healing.zh_hans: 疲惫时就休息，让自己焕然一新。

Healing.quote: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
Healing.author: Leonardo da Vinci
Healing.zh: 簡約，是最高境界的精煉。
Healing.zh_hans: 简约，是最高境界的精炼。

Healing.quote: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
Healing.author: Lao Tzu
Healing.zh: 天道不急，萬事皆成。
Healing.zh_hans: 天道不急，万事皆成。

Healing.quote: Where there is love there is life.
Healing.author: Mahatma Gandhi
Healing.zh: 有愛之處，便有生命。
Healing.zh_hans: 有爱之处，便有生命。

Healing.quote: The wound heals, the mark remains.
Healing.author: Old Proverb
Healing.zh: 傷口癒合，印記長存。
Healing.zh_hans: 伤口愈合，印记长存。

Healing.quote: Calm mind brings inner strength and self-confidence.
Healing.author: Dalai Lama
Healing.zh: 平靜的心，帶來內在的力量與自信。
Healing.zh_hans: 平静的心，带来内在的力量与自信。

Healing.quote: You yourself, as much as anybody, deserve your love and affection.
Healing.author: Buddha
Healing.zh: 你自己，和任何人一樣，值得被愛與關懷。
Healing.zh_hans: 你自己，和任何人一样，值得被爱与关怀。

Healing.quote: The greatest healing therapy is friendship and love.
Healing.author: Hubert H. Humphrey
Healing.zh: 最好的療癒，是友誼與愛。
Healing.zh_hans: 最好的疗愈，是友谊与爱。

Healing.quote: Softly and gently, the heart mends with time.
Healing.author: Traditional Saying
Healing.zh: 時光流逝，心靈緩緩癒合。
Healing.zh_hans: 时光流逝，心灵缓缓愈合。

Healing.quote: Healing is not linear, and that is okay.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 康復並非直線前進，這沒關係。
Healing.zh_hans: 康复并非直线前进，这没关系。

Healing.quote: Rest is a vital part of progress.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 休息是進步的重要部分。
Healing.zh_hans: 休息是进步的重要部分。

Healing.quote: Let yourself grow quietly, like a tree.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 讓自己像樹一樣悄悄成長。
Healing.zh_hans: 让自己像树一样悄悄成长。

Healing.quote: Softness is not weakness; it is strength in disguise.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 柔軟不是軟弱，而是偽裝中的力量。
Healing.zh_hans: 柔软不是软弱，而是伪装中的力量。

Healing.quote: Be gentle with yourself. You are doing the best you can.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 對自己溫柔一點，你已經盡力了。
Healing.zh_hans: 对自己温柔一点，你已经尽力了。

Healing.quote: Find peace in the small pauses.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 在短暫的停頓中尋得平靜。
Healing.zh_hans: 在短暂的停顿中寻得平静。

Healing.quote: Your scars are proof that you survived.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 你的傷痕證明你活了下來。
Healing.zh_hans: 你的伤痕证明你活了下来。

Healing.quote: A quiet mind heals faster.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 平靜的心靈，癒合得更快。
Healing.zh_hans: 平静的心灵，愈合得更快。

Healing.quote: The heart mends in its own time.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 心會在自己的時間裡修補。
Healing.zh_hans: 心会在自己的时间里修补。

Healing.quote: Compassion begins with self-acceptance.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 慈悲始於接納自己。
Healing.zh_hans: 慈悲始于接纳自己。

Healing.quote: Every sunrise brings another chance to heal.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 每個日出，都帶來新的治癒機會。
Healing.zh_hans: 每个日出，都带来新的治愈机会。

Healing.quote: Forgiveness is a gift you give yourself.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 寬恕是你給自己的禮物。
Healing.zh_hans: 宽恕是你给自己的礼物。

Healing.quote: Breathe slowly and let the day soften. Let it be.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 慢慢呼吸，讓一天變得柔和。讓它自然發生。
Healing.zh_hans: 慢慢呼吸，让一天变得柔和。让它自然发生。

Healing.quote: Gentle steps can carry you home. Let it be.
Healing.author: Ari
Healing.zh: 輕柔的步伐可以帶你回到平靜。讓它自然發生。
Healing.zh_hans: 轻柔的步伐可以带你回到平静。让它自然发生。

Healing.quote: Let peace arrive before pressure. Let it be.
Healing.author: Mina
Healing.zh: 讓平靜先於壓力到來。讓它自然發生。
Healing.zh_hans: 让平静先于压力到来。让它自然发生。

Healing.quote: Your heart can heal in quiet moments. Let it be.
Healing.author: Jules
Healing.zh: 你的心會在安靜的時刻慢慢癒合。讓它自然發生。
Healing.zh_hans: 你的心会在安静的时刻慢慢愈合。让它自然发生。

Healing.quote: Tender patience often brings clarity. Let it be.
Healing.author: Sage
Healing.zh: 溫柔的耐心常常帶來清晰。讓它自然發生。
Healing.zh_hans: 温柔的耐心常常带来清晰。让它自然发生。

Healing.quote: A calm breath can reset a heavy mind. Let it be.
Healing.author: Noor
Healing.zh: 一個平靜的呼吸可以安放沉重的心。讓它自然發生。
Healing.zh_hans: 一个平静的呼吸可以安放沉重的心。让它自然发生。

Healing.quote: Healing often begins with rest. Let it be.
Healing.author: Drew
Healing.zh: 癒合往往從休息開始。讓它自然發生。
Healing.zh_hans: 愈合往往从休息开始。让它自然发生。

Healing.quote: Give yourself room to feel and recover. Let it be.
Healing.author: Taylor
Healing.zh: 給自己空間去感受和恢復。讓它自然發生。
Healing.zh_hans: 给自己空间去感受和恢复。让它自然发生。

Healing.quote: Even a slow day can be a healing day. Let it be.
Healing.author: Iris
Healing.zh: 即使是緩慢的一天，也可以是治癒的一天。讓它自然發生。
Healing.zh_hans: 即使是缓慢的一天，也可以是治愈的一天。让它自然发生。

Healing.quote: Softness can be a powerful strength. Let it be.
Healing.author: Lena
Healing.zh: 柔軟也可以是一種強大的力量。讓它自然發生。
Healing.zh_hans: 柔软也可以是一种强大的力量。让它自然发生。

Healing.quote: Breathe slowly and let the day soften. Take your time.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 慢慢呼吸，讓一天變得柔和。慢慢來。
Healing.zh_hans: 慢慢呼吸，让一天变得柔和。慢慢来。

Healing.quote: Gentle steps can carry you home. Take your time.
Healing.author: Ari
Healing.zh: 輕柔的步伐可以帶你回到平靜。慢慢來。
Healing.zh_hans: 轻柔的步伐可以带你回到平静。慢慢来。

Healing.quote: Let peace arrive before pressure. Take your time.

Healing.zh: 讓平靜先於壓力到來。慢慢來。
Healing.zh_hans: 让平静先于压力到来。慢慢来。

Healing.quote: Your heart can heal in quiet moments. Take your time.
Healing.author: Jules
Healing.zh: 你的心會在安靜的時刻慢慢癒合。慢慢來。
Healing.zh_hans: 你的心会在安静的时刻慢慢愈合。慢慢来。

Healing.zh_hans: 一个平静的呼吸可以安放沉重的心。慢慢来。

Healing.zh: 癒合往往從休息開始。慢慢來。
Healing.zh_hans: 愈合往往从休息开始。慢慢来。

Healing.zh: 給自己空間去感受和恢復。慢慢來。
Healing.zh_hans: 给自己空间去感受和恢复。慢慢来。

Healing.author: Iris
Healing.zh: 即使是緩慢的一天，也可以是治癒的一天。慢慢來。
Healing.zh_hans: 即使是缓慢的一天，也可以是治愈的一天。慢慢来。

Healing.quote: Softness can be a powerful strength. Take your time.
Healing.author: Lena
Healing.zh: 柔軟也可以是一種強大的力量。慢慢來。
Healing.zh_hans: 柔软也可以是一种强大的力量。慢慢来。

Healing.quote: Breathe slowly and let the day soften. Trust the process.
Healing.author: Unknown
Healing.zh: 慢慢呼吸，讓一天變得柔和。相信這個過程。
Healing.zh_hans: 慢慢呼吸，让一天变得柔和。相信这个过程。

Healing.quote: Gentle steps can carry you home. Trust the process.
Healing.author: Ari
Healing.zh: 輕柔的步伐可以帶你回到平靜。相信這個過程。
Healing.zh_hans: 轻柔的步伐可以带你回到平静。相信这个过程。

Healing.zh_hans: 你的心会在安静的时刻慢慢愈合。相信这个过程。

Hustle.quote: The early bird catches the worm.
Hustle.author: Proverb
Hustle.zh: 早起的鳥兒有蟲喫。
Hustle.zh_hans: 早起的鸟儿有虫吃。

Hustle.quote: No pain, no gain.
Hustle.author: Traditional Saying
Hustle.zh: 喫得苦中苦，方為人上人。
Hustle.zh_hans: 吃得苦中苦，方为人上人。

Hustle.quote: Fortune favors the diligent.
Hustle.author: Proverb
Hustle.zh: 勤者得福。
Hustle.zh_hans: 勤者得福。

Hustle.quote: God helps those who help themselves.
Hustle.author: Proverb
Hustle.zh: 天助自助者。
Hustle.zh_hans: 天助自助者。

Hustle.quote: A smooth sea never made a skilled sailor.
Hustle.author: Proverb
Hustle.zh: 平靜的海洋，從未造就出優秀的水手。
Hustle.zh_hans: 平静的海洋，从未造就出优秀的水手。

Hustle.quote: Sweat now, shine later.
Hustle.author: Traditional Saying
Hustle.zh: 今日流汗，他日發光。
Hustle.zh_hans: 今日流汗，他日发光。

Hustle.quote: Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
Hustle.author: Traditional Saying
Hustle.zh: 夢想要大，努力要狠，專注要深。
Hustle.zh_hans: 梦想要大，努力要狠，专注要深。

Hustle.quote: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
Hustle.author: Thomas Edison
Hustle.zh: 天才是百分之一的靈感，加上百分之九十九的汗水。
Hustle.zh_hans: 天才是百分之一的灵感，加上百分之九十九的汗水。

Hustle.quote: There are no shortcuts to any place worth going.
Hustle.author: Beverly Sills
Hustle.zh: 凡是值得去的地方，都沒有捷徑。
Hustle.zh_hans: 凡是值得去的地方，都没有捷径。

Hustle.quote: Action is the foundational key to all success.
Hustle.author: Pablo Picasso
Hustle.zh: 行動是一切成功的根本。
Hustle.zh_hans: 行动是一切成功的根本。

Hustle.quote: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
Hustle.author: Chris Grosser
Hustle.zh: 機會不是等來的，是自己創造的。
Hustle.zh_hans: 机会不是等来的，是自己创造的。

Hustle.quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
Hustle.author: Walt Disney
Hustle.zh: 開始的方法，就是停止空談，付諸行動。
Hustle.zh_hans: 开始的方法，就是停止空谈，付诸行动。

Hustle.quote: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
Hustle.author: Tim Notke
Hustle.zh: 當天才不努力時，努力就能勝過天才。
Hustle.zh_hans: 当天才不努力时，努力就能胜过天才。

Hustle.quote: Rise and grind.
Hustle.author: Traditional Saying
Hustle.zh: 起身，拼搏。
Hustle.zh_hans: 起身，拼搏。

Hustle.quote: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
Hustle.author: Henry David Thoreau
Hustle.zh: 成功往往降臨在那些忙到沒時間去追求它的人身上。
Hustle.zh_hans: 成功往往降临在那些忙到没时间去追求它的人身上。

Hustle.quote: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
Hustle.author: Confucius
Hustle.zh: 移山之人，始於搬石。
Hustle.zh_hans: 移山之人，始于搬石。

Hustle.quote: Well done is better than well said.
Hustle.author: Benjamin Franklin
Hustle.zh: 做得好，勝過說得好。
Hustle.zh_hans: 做得好，胜过说得好。

Hustle.quote: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
Hustle.author: Sam Levenson
Hustle.zh: 別盯著時鐘；學它的樣子，不斷前進。
Hustle.zh_hans: 别盯著时钟；学它的样子，不断前进。

Hustle.quote: It is not the mountain we conquer, but ourselves.
Hustle.author: Sir Edmund Hillary
Hustle.zh: 我們征服的不是山，而是自己。
Hustle.zh_hans: 我们征服的不是山，而是自己。

Hustle.quote: The only place where success comes before work is in the dictionary.
Hustle.author: Vidal Sassoon
Hustle.zh: 只有在字典裡，成功才排在努力之前。
Hustle.zh_hans: 只有在字典里，成功才排在努力之前。

Hustle.quote: Diligence is the mother of good fortune.
Hustle.author: Miguel de Cervantes
Hustle.zh: 勤奮是好運之母。
Hustle.zh_hans: 勤奋是好运之母。

Hustle.quote: Work hard in silence, let success make the noise.
Hustle.author: Traditional Saying
Hustle.zh: 默默耕耘，讓成功替你發聲。
Hustle.zh_hans: 默默耕耘，让成功替你发声。

Hustle.quote: The expert in anything was once a beginner.
Hustle.author: Helen Hayes
Hustle.zh: 任何領域的專家，都曾是初學者。
Hustle.zh_hans: 任何领域的专家，都曾是初学者。

Hustle.quote: Perseverance is not a long race; it is many short races one after the other.
Hustle.author: Walter Elliot
Hustle.zh: 堅持不是一場漫長的賽跑，而是一場接一場的短跑。
Hustle.zh_hans: 坚持不是一场漫长的赛跑，而是一场接一场的短跑。

Hustle.quote: A goal without a plan is just a wish.
Hustle.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupery
Hustle.zh: 沒有計劃的目標，只是一個願望。
Hustle.zh_hans: 没有计划的目标，只是一个愿望。

Hustle.quote: Dreams demand hustle, not just hope.
Hustle.author: Unknown
Hustle.zh: 夢想需要努力，而不只是希望。
Hustle.zh_hans: 梦想需要努力，而不只是希望。

Hustle.quote: Go the extra mile; it is never crowded.
Hustle.author: Unknown
Hustle.zh: 多走一里路，從不會擁擠。
Hustle.zh_hans: 多走一里路，从不会拥挤。

Hustle.quote: Focus on what moves you forward.
Hustle.author: Unknown
Hustle.zh: 專注於推動你前進的事物。
Hustle.zh_hans: 专注于推动你前进的事物。

Hustle.quote: Work hard in silence and let success make the noise.
Hustle.author: Frank Ocean
Hustle.zh: 默默努力，讓成功發聲。
Hustle.zh_hans: 默默努力，让成功发声。

Hustle.quote: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
Hustle.author: Abraham Lincoln
Hustle.zh: 自律是在當下與未來之間做出選擇。
Hustle.zh_hans: 自律是在当下与未来之间做出选择。

Hustle.quote: The grind today builds the freedom of tomorrow.
Hustle.author: Unknown
Hustle.zh: 今日的努力，奠定明日的自由。
Hustle.zh_hans: 今日的努力，奠定明日的自由。

Hustle.quote: Stay hungry for growth.
Hustle.author: Unknown
Hustle.zh: 保持對成長的渴望。
Hustle.zh_hans: 保持对成长的渴望。

Hustle.quote: Make your ambition louder than your fear.
Hustle.author: Unknown
Hustle.zh: 讓你的野心比恐懼更響亮。
Hustle.zh_hans: 让你的野心比恐惧更响亮。

Hustle.quote: Rise before the sun and earn your day.
Hustle.author: Unknown
Hustle.zh: 日出之前起身，贏得屬於你的一天。
Hustle.zh_hans: 日出之前起身，赢得属于你的一天。

Hustle.quote: Persistence is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
Hustle.author: Jim Rohn
Hustle.zh: 堅持是目標與成就之間的橋樑。
Hustle.zh_hans: 坚持是目标与成就之间的桥梁。

Hustle.quote: Challenge yourself; it is where change begins.
Hustle.author: Unknown
Hustle.zh: 挑戰自己，變化從那裡開始。
Hustle.zh_hans: 挑战自己，变化从那里开始。

Hustle.quote: Momentum is built one consistent action at a time.
Hustle.author: Unknown
Hustle.zh: 動力由每一個持續的行動累積而成。
Hustle.zh_hans: 动力由每一个持续的行动累积而成。

Hustle.quote: Work with discipline and let focus carry you. Do the work.
Hustle.author: Unknown
Hustle.zh: 用紀律工作，讓專注帶你前行。把工作做完。
Hustle.zh_hans: 用纪律工作，让专注带你前行。把工作做完。

Hustle.quote: Turn effort into momentum every single day. Do the work.
Hustle.author: Ari
Hustle.zh: 把每一天的努力轉化爲動力。把工作做完。
Hustle.zh_hans: 把每一天的努力转化为动力。把工作做完。

Hustle.quote: Your standards can shape your results. Do the work.
Hustle.author: Mina
Hustle.zh: 你的標準會塑造你的結果。把工作做完。
Hustle.zh_hans: 你的标准会塑造你的结果。把工作做完。

Hustle.quote: Consistency beats intensity when intensity fades. Do the work.
Hustle.author: Jules
Hustle.zh: 當熱情減弱時，持續性總能勝過衝動。把工作做完。
Hustle.zh_hans: 当热情减弱时，持续性总能胜过冲动。把工作做完。

Hustle.quote: Make your plan and honor it. Do the work.
Hustle.author: Sage
Hustle.zh: 制定計劃，並堅持執行。把工作做完。
Hustle.zh_hans: 制定计划，并坚持执行。把工作做完。

Hustle.quote: Turn small habits into lasting progress. Do the work.
Hustle.author: Noor
Hustle.zh: 把小習慣變成持續進步。把工作做完。
Hustle.zh_hans: 把小习惯变成持续进步。把工作做完。

Hustle.quote: The strong finish what the steady begins. Do the work.
Hustle.author: Drew
Hustle.zh: 穩紮穩打的人，往往能走到最後。把工作做完。
Hustle.zh_hans: 稳扎稳打的人，往往能走到最后。把工作做完。

Hustle.quote: Show up early and stay present. Do the work.
Hustle.author: Taylor
Hustle.zh: 早一點出現，保持專注。把工作做完。
Hustle.zh_hans: 早一点出现，保持专注。把工作做完。

Hustle.author: Iris
Hustle.zh: 當注意力清晰時，工作會更有力量。把工作做完。
Hustle.zh_hans: 当注意力清晰时，工作会更有力量。把工作做完。

Hustle.zh: 用紀律工作，讓專注帶你前行。帶着目標前進。
Hustle.zh_hans: 用纪律工作，让专注带你前行。带着目标前进。

Hustle.quote: Turn effort into momentum every single day. Move with purpose.
Hustle.author: Ari
Hustle.zh: 把每一天的努力轉化爲動力。帶着目標前進。
Hustle.zh_hans: 把每一天的努力转化为动力。带着目标前进。

Hustle.quote: Your standards can shape your results. Move with purpose.
Hustle.author: Mina
Hustle.zh: 你的標準會塑造你的結果。帶着目標前進。
Hustle.zh_hans: 你的标准会塑造你的结果。带着目标前进。

Hustle.quote: Consistency beats intensity when intensity fades. Move with purpose.
Hustle.author: Jules
Hustle.zh: 當熱情減弱時，持續性總能勝過衝動。帶着目標前進。
Hustle.zh_hans: 当热情减弱时，持续性总能胜过冲动。带着目标前进。

Hustle.quote: Make your plan and honor it. Move with purpose.
Hustle.author: Sage
Hustle.zh: 制定計劃，並堅持執行。帶着目標前進。
Hustle.zh_hans: 制定计划，并坚持执行。带着目标前进。

Hustle.quote: Turn small habits into lasting progress. Move with purpose.
Hustle.author: Noor
Hustle.zh: 把小習慣變成持續進步。帶着目標前進。
Hustle.zh_hans: 把小习惯变成持续进步。带着目标前进。

Hustle.quote: The strong finish what the steady begins. Move with purpose.
Hustle.author: Drew
Hustle.zh: 穩紮穩打的人，往往能走到最後。帶着目標前進。
Hustle.zh_hans: 稳扎稳打的人，往往能走到最后。带着目标前进。

Hustle.quote: Show up early and stay present. Move with purpose.
Hustle.author: Taylor
Hustle.zh: 早一點出現，保持專注。帶着目標前進。
Hustle.zh_hans: 早一点出现，保持专注。带着目标前进。

Hustle.quote: Your work becomes stronger when your attention is clear. Move with purpose.
Hustle.author: Iris
Hustle.zh: 當注意力清晰時，工作會更有力量。帶着目標前進。
Hustle.zh_hans: 当注意力清晰时，工作会更有力量。带着目标前进。

Hustle.quote: Keep your standards high and your doubts low. Move with purpose.
Hustle.author: Lena
Hustle.zh: 把標準保持高，把懷疑壓低。帶着目標前進。
Hustle.zh_hans: 把标准保持高，把怀疑压低。带着目标前进。

Hustle.quote: Work with discipline and let focus carry you. Stay committed.
Hustle.author: Unknown
Hustle.zh: 用紀律工作，讓專注帶你前行。保持投入。
Hustle.zh_hans: 用纪律工作，让专注带你前行。保持投入。

Hustle.quote: Turn effort into momentum every single day. Stay committed.

Hustle.zh: 把每一天的努力轉化爲動力。保持投入。
Hustle.zh_hans: 把每一天的努力转化为动力。保持投入。

Hustle.zh_hans: 当热情减弱时，持续性总能胜过冲动。保持投入。

Hustle.zh_hans: 当注意力清晰时，工作会更有力量。保持投入。

Hustle.author: Lena
Hustle.zh: 把標準保持高，把懷疑壓低。保持投入。
Hustle.zh_hans: 把标准保持高，把怀疑压低。保持投入。

Hustle.quote: Work with discipline and let focus carry you. Keep the pace.
Hustle.author: Unknown
Hustle.zh: 用紀律工作，讓專注帶你前行。保持節奏。
Hustle.zh_hans: 用纪律工作，让专注带你前行。保持节奏。

Hustle.zh_hans: 把每一天的努力转化为动力。保持节奏。

Hustle.zh: 你的標準會塑造你的結果。保持節奏。
Hustle.zh_hans: 你的标准会塑造你的结果。保持节奏。

Hustle.zh: 當熱情減弱時，持續性總能勝過衝動。保持節奏。
Hustle.zh_hans: 当热情减弱时，持续性总能胜过冲动。保持节奏。

Hustle.zh: 制定計劃，並堅持執行。保持節奏。

Hustle.zh_hans: 把小习惯变成持续进步。保持节奏。

Calm.quote: This too shall pass.
Calm.author: Traditional Proverb
Calm.zh: 一切終將過去。
Calm.zh_hans: 一切终将过去。

Calm.quote: Still waters run deep.
Calm.author: Proverb
Calm.zh: 靜水流深。
Calm.zh_hans: 静水流深。

Calm.quote: Peace begins with a smile.
Calm.author: Mother Teresa
Calm.zh: 和平始於微笑。
Calm.zh_hans: 和平始于微笑。

Calm.quote: Silence is a source of great strength.
Calm.author: Lao Tzu
Calm.zh: 沉默是力量的源泉。
Calm.zh_hans: 沉默是力量的源泉。

Calm.quote: The quieter you become, the more you can hear.
Calm.author: Ram Dass (traditional attribution)
Calm.zh: 你愈安靜，你能聽見的愈多。
Calm.zh_hans: 你愈安静，你能听见的愈多。

Calm.quote: Within you, there is a stillness and a sanctuary.
Calm.author: Hermann Hesse
Calm.zh: 你的內心深處，有一份寧靜與聖地。
Calm.zh_hans: 你的内心深处，有一份宁静与圣地。

Calm.quote: Calmness is the cradle of power.
Calm.author: Josiah Gilbert Holland
Calm.zh: 平靜是力量的搖籃。
Calm.zh_hans: 平静是力量的摇篮。

Calm.quote: Breathe. Let go. And remind yourself that this very moment is the only one you know you have for sure.
Calm.author: Oprah Winfrey (traditional saying)
Calm.zh: 深呼吸，放手，提醒自己：此刻是你唯一確定擁有的。
Calm.zh_hans: 深呼吸，放手，提醒自己：此刻是你唯一确定拥有的。

Calm.quote: In the midst of movement and chaos, keep stillness inside of you.
Calm.author: Deepak Chopra
Calm.zh: 在動盪與混亂之中，保持內心的靜定。
Calm.zh_hans: 在动荡与混乱之中，保持内心的静定。

Calm.quote: Nature always wears the colors of the spirit.
Calm.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
Calm.zh: 大自然永遠披著心靈的色彩。
Calm.zh_hans: 大自然永远披著心灵的色彩。

Calm.quote: Quiet the mind, and the soul will speak.
Calm.author: Ma Jaya Sati Bhagavati
Calm.zh: 讓心靜下來，靈魂自然會說話。
Calm.zh_hans: 让心静下来，灵魂自然会说话。

Calm.quote: Wherever you are, be all there.
Calm.author: Jim Elliot
Calm.zh: 無論你身在何處，請全心投入當下。
Calm.zh_hans: 无论你身在何处，请全心投入当下。

Calm.quote: The mind is like water; when it's turbulent, it's difficult to see. When it's calm, everything becomes clear.
Calm.author: Prasad Mahes
Calm.zh: 心如水，動則難見，靜則萬物清晰。
Calm.zh_hans: 心如水，动则难见，静则万物清晰。

Calm.quote: Let nature be your teacher.
Calm.author: William Wordsworth
Calm.zh: 讓大自然成為你的老師。
Calm.zh_hans: 让大自然成为你的老师。

Calm.quote: Serenity is not freedom from the storm, but peace amid the storm.
Calm.author: Traditional Saying
Calm.zh: 寧靜不是遠離風暴，而是在風暴中保持平和。
Calm.zh_hans: 宁静不是远离风暴，而是在风暴中保持平和。

Calm.quote: One kind word can change someone's entire day.
Calm.author: Traditional Saying
Calm.zh: 一句溫柔的話，可以改變一個人整天的心情。
Calm.zh_hans: 一句温柔的话，可以改变一个人整天的心情。

Calm.quote: A quiet mind is able to hear intuition over fear.
Calm.author: Traditional Saying
Calm.zh: 平靜的心，能在恐懼之上聽見直覺的聲音。
Calm.zh_hans: 平静的心，能在恐惧之上听见直觉的声音。

Calm.quote: Simplify, then add lightness.
Calm.author: Colin Chapman
Calm.zh: 先簡化，再添輕盈。
Calm.zh_hans: 先简化，再添轻盈。

Calm.quote: Slow down and everything you are chasing will come around and catch you.
Calm.author: John De Paola
Calm.zh: 慢下來，你所追逐的一切，終將追上你。
Calm.zh_hans: 慢下来，你所追逐的一切，终将追上你。

Calm.quote: The soul always knows what to do to heal itself. The challenge is to silence the mind.
Calm.author: Caroline Myss
Calm.zh: 靈魂始終知道如何自我療癒，挑戰在於讓心靜下來。
Calm.zh_hans: 灵魂始终知道如何自我疗愈，挑战在于让心静下来。

Calm.quote: Almost everything will work again if you unplug it for a few minutes, including you.
Calm.author: Anne Lamott
Calm.zh: 幾乎所有東西，關機幾分鐘後都會重新運作，包括你自己。
Calm.zh_hans: 几乎所有东西，关机几分钟后都会重新运作，包括你自己。

Calm.quote: Gratitude turns what we have into enough.
Calm.author: Traditional Saying
Calm.zh: 感恩，讓我們所擁有的變得足夠。
Calm.zh_hans: 感恩，让我们所拥有的变得足够。

Calm.quote: The present moment is the only moment available to us.
Calm.author: Thich Nhat Hanh
Calm.zh: 當下這一刻，是我們唯一真正擁有的。
Calm.zh_hans: 当下这一刻，是我们唯一真正拥有的。

Calm.quote: Sit in reflection when possible; let your soul catch up with your body.
Calm.author: Traditional Saying
Calm.zh: 有機會就靜坐沉思，讓靈魂追上身體的步伐。
Calm.zh_hans: 有机会就静坐沉思，让灵魂追上身体的步伐。

Calm.quote: Home is where the heart finds its peace.
Calm.author: Traditional Saying
Calm.zh: 家，是心靈找到平靜的地方。
Calm.zh_hans: 家，是心灵找到平静的地方。

Calm.quote: Peace begins with a single deep breath.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 平靜始於一口深呼吸。
Calm.zh_hans: 平静始于一口深呼吸。

Calm.quote: Stillness is the beginning of clarity.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 靜止是清晰的開始。
Calm.zh_hans: 静止是清晰的开始。

Calm.quote: Let go of what no longer serves you.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 放下不再為你服務的東西。
Calm.zh_hans: 放下不再为你服务的东西。

Calm.quote: A calm mind sees clearly.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 平靜的心，能看得更清楚。
Calm.zh_hans: 平静的心，能看得更清楚。

Calm.quote: Be where your feet are.
Calm.author: The Buddha
Calm.zh: 活在當下，腳踏實地。
Calm.zh_hans: 活在当下，脚踏实地。

Calm.quote: Silence can speak louder than words.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 沉默有時比言語更響亮。
Calm.zh_hans: 沉默有时比言语更响亮。

Calm.quote: Simplicity brings serenity.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 簡單帶來寧靜。
Calm.zh_hans: 简单带来宁静。

Calm.quote: Slow down and savor the present.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 放慢腳步，品味當下。
Calm.zh_hans: 放慢脚步，品味当下。

Calm.quote: A quiet heart is a powerful heart.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 寧靜的心，是強大的心。
Calm.zh_hans: 宁静的心，是强大的心。

Calm.quote: The mind is like water; stillness brings reflection.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 心靈如水，靜止讓你反思。
Calm.zh_hans: 心灵如水，静止让你反思。

Calm.quote: Find balance in the gentle rhythm of your breath.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 在呼吸的柔和節奏中找到平衡。
Calm.zh_hans: 在呼吸的柔和节奏中找到平衡。

Calm.quote: Rest is an act of courage.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 休息是一種勇氣。
Calm.zh_hans: 休息是一种勇气。

Calm.quote: Sometimes the bravest thing is to do nothing.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 有時最勇敢的事，就是什麼都不做。
Calm.zh_hans: 有时最勇敢的事，就是什么都不做。

Calm.quote: Choose calm before chaos arrives. Take a breath.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 在混亂到來之前先選擇平靜。深呼吸一下。
Calm.zh_hans: 在混乱到来之前先选择平静。深呼吸一下。

Calm.quote: Quiet minds often make wiser choices. Take a breath.
Calm.author: Ari
Calm.zh: 安靜的心往往能做出更明智的選擇。深呼吸一下。
Calm.zh_hans: 安静的心往往能做出更明智的选择。深呼吸一下。

Calm.quote: A peaceful pause can save a difficult day. Take a breath.
Calm.author: Mina
Calm.zh: 一個平靜的停頓可以拯救艱難的一天。深呼吸一下。
Calm.zh_hans: 一个平静的停顿可以拯救艰难的一天。深呼吸一下。

Calm.quote: Stillness can hold more wisdom than noise. Take a breath.
Calm.author: Jules
Calm.zh: 靜止所包含的智慧，常常多於喧囂。深呼吸一下。
Calm.zh_hans: 静止所包含的智慧，常常多于喧嚣。深呼吸一下。

Calm.quote: Let clarity arrive before you speak. Take a breath.
Calm.author: Sage
Calm.zh: 在說話前，先讓思緒變得清晰。深呼吸一下。
Calm.zh_hans: 在说话前，先让思绪变得清晰。深呼吸一下。

Calm.quote: Savor the simple moments and let them settle. Take a breath.
Calm.author: Noor
Calm.zh: 珍惜簡單的時刻，讓它們安定下來。深呼吸一下。
Calm.zh_hans: 珍惜简单的时刻，让它们安定下来。深呼吸一下。

Calm.quote: Peace is a strength you can practice. Take a breath.
Calm.author: Drew
Calm.zh: 平靜是一種可以練習的力量。深呼吸一下。
Calm.zh_hans: 平静是一种可以练习的力量。深呼吸一下。

Calm.quote: A gentle rhythm can steady a busy life. Take a breath.
Calm.author: Taylor
Calm.zh: 輕柔的節奏可以穩住忙碌的人生。深呼吸一下。
Calm.zh_hans: 轻柔的节奏可以稳住忙碌的人生。深呼吸一下。

Calm.quote: Calm is not passivity; it is balance. Take a breath.
Calm.author: Iris
Calm.zh: 平靜不是被動，而是平衡。深呼吸一下。
Calm.zh_hans: 平静不是被动，而是平衡。深呼吸一下。

Calm.quote: Make room for silence and let it restore you. Take a breath.
Calm.author: Lena
Calm.zh: 給沉默留出空間，讓它恢復你。深呼吸一下。
Calm.zh_hans: 给沉默留出空间，让它恢复你。深呼吸一下。

Calm.quote: Choose calm before chaos arrives. Enjoy the quiet.
Calm.author: Unknown
Calm.zh: 在混亂到來之前先選擇平靜。享受安靜。
Calm.zh_hans: 在混乱到来之前先选择平静。享受安静。

Calm.quote: Quiet minds often make wiser choices. Enjoy the quiet.
Calm.author: Ari
Calm.zh: 安靜的心往往能做出更明智的選擇。享受安靜。
Calm.zh_hans: 安静的心往往能做出更明智的选择。享受安静。

Calm.quote: A peaceful pause can save a difficult day. Enjoy the quiet.
Calm.author: Mina
Calm.zh: 一個平靜的停頓可以拯救艱難的一天。享受安靜。
Calm.zh_hans: 一个平静的停顿可以拯救艰难的一天。享受安静。

Calm.quote: Stillness can hold more wisdom than noise. Enjoy the quiet.
Calm.author: Jules
Calm.zh: 靜止所包含的智慧，常常多於喧囂。享受安靜。
Calm.zh_hans: 静止所包含的智慧，常常多于喧嚣。享受安静。

Calm.quote: Let clarity arrive before you speak. Enjoy the quiet.
Calm.author: Sage
Calm.zh: 在說話前，先讓思緒變得清晰。享受安靜。
Calm.zh_hans: 在说话前，先让思绪变得清晰。享受安静。

Calm.quote: Savor the simple moments and let them settle. Enjoy the quiet.
Calm.author: Noor
Calm.zh: 珍惜簡單的時刻，讓它們安定下來。享受安靜。
Calm.zh_hans: 珍惜简单的时刻，让它们安定下来。享受安静。

Calm.quote: Peace is a strength you can practice. Enjoy the quiet.
Calm.author: Drew
Calm.zh: 平靜是一種可以練習的力量。享受安靜。
Calm.zh_hans: 平静是一种可以练习的力量。享受安静。

Calm.quote: A gentle rhythm can steady a busy life. Enjoy the quiet.
Calm.author: Taylor
